title: Vanilla Soft Serve
description: Creamy vanilla soft serve dispensed right from your Ninja CREAMi Scoop & Swirl. Uses instant pudding mix for an ultra-smooth, shop-quality texture that rivals any soft serve stand.

steps.instruction: In a large bowl, whisk together sugar and pudding mix.
Slowly add milk, heavy cream, and vanilla. Whisk until combined and sugar is dissolved.
Make sure pint base is closed. Pour mixture into an empty Swirl Pint. Place storage lid on pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Remove pint from freezer and remove lid from pint.
Select SOFT SERVE, then ICE CREAM.
When processing is complete, dispense into a chilled bowl or cone and serve immediately.

title: Chocolate Soft Serve
description: Rich, velvety chocolate soft serve made with cocoa powder and chocolate pudding mix. Dispensed directly from the Ninja CREAMi Scoop & Swirl for that authentic soft serve experience.

steps.instruction: In a large bowl, whisk together sugar, pudding mix, and cocoa powder.
Slowly add milk, heavy cream, and vanilla extract. Whisk until fully combined and sugar is dissolved.
Make sure pint base is closed. Pour mixture into an empty Swirl Pint. Place storage lid on pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Remove pint from freezer and remove lid from pint.
Select SOFT SERVE, then ICE CREAM.
When processing is complete, dispense into a chilled bowl or cone and serve immediately.

title: Fresh Strawberry Soft Serve
description: Sweet and fruity strawberry soft serve made with real fresh strawberries. Blend, freeze, and dispense for a refreshing soft serve treat bursting with natural strawberry flavor.

steps.instruction: Add all ingredients to a blender and blend until completely smooth.
Make sure pint base is closed. Pour mixture into an empty Swirl Pint to the MAX FILL line. Place storage lid on pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Remove pint from freezer and remove lid from pint.
Select SOFT SERVE, then ICE CREAM.
When processing is complete, dispense into a chilled bowl or cone and serve immediately.

title: One-Ingredient Frozen Yogurt Soft Serve
description: The simplest soft serve recipe possible — just yogurt. Freeze it, spin it, and dispense creamy frozen yogurt soft serve. Try different flavored yogurts for endless variety.

steps.instruction: Make sure pint base is closed. Pour yogurt into an empty Swirl Pint to the MAX FILL line. Stir to combine. Place storage lid on pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Remove pint from freezer and remove lid from pint.
Select SOFT SERVE, then FROZEN YOGURT.
Dispense into a chilled bowl or cone and serve immediately.

title: Cookies and Cream Soft Serve
description: Classic cookies and cream in soft serve form. Creamy vanilla base with crushed Oreo cookies folded in, then dispensed as smooth soft serve from the Ninja CREAMi Scoop & Swirl.

steps.instruction: In a large bowl, whisk together sugar and pudding mix.
Slowly add milk, heavy cream, and vanilla. Whisk until combined and sugar is dissolved.
Fold in finely crushed Oreo cookies.
Make sure pint base is closed. Pour mixture into an empty Swirl Pint. Place storage lid on pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Remove pint from freezer and remove lid from pint.
Select SOFT SERVE, then ICE CREAM.
When processing is complete, dispense into a chilled bowl or cone and serve immediately.

title: Peanut Butter Soft Serve
description: Creamy peanut butter soft serve with a smooth, nutty flavor. The pudding mix gives it that perfect soft serve consistency when dispensed from the Scoop & Swirl.

steps.instruction: In a large bowl, whisk together sugar and pudding mix.
Warm the peanut butter in the microwave for 10 seconds until pourable.
Add milk, heavy cream, peanut butter, and vanilla. Whisk until fully combined and sugar is dissolved.
Make sure pint base is closed. Pour mixture into an empty Swirl Pint. Place storage lid on pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Remove pint from freezer and remove lid from pint.
Select SOFT SERVE, then ICE CREAM.
When processing is complete, dispense into a chilled bowl or cone and serve immediately.

title: Mango Sorbet Soft Serve
description: Tropical mango sorbet dispensed as soft serve. Made with frozen mango chunks, sugar, and lime juice for a refreshing dairy-free treat that's perfect for hot days.

steps.instruction: Add mango chunks, water, sugar, and lime juice to a blender. Blend until completely smooth.
Make sure pint base is closed. Pour mixture into an empty Swirl Pint to the MAX FILL line. Place storage lid on pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Remove pint from freezer and remove lid from pint.
Select SOFT SERVE, then SORBET.
When processing is complete, dispense into a chilled bowl and serve immediately.

title: Salted Caramel Soft Serve
description: Indulgent salted caramel soft serve with the perfect sweet-salty balance. Caramel sauce and a pinch of sea salt create a luxurious soft serve that tastes like it came from a gourmet shop.

steps.instruction: In a large bowl, whisk together sugar and pudding mix.
Add milk, heavy cream, caramel sauce, vanilla, and sea salt. Whisk until fully combined and sugar is dissolved.
Make sure pint base is closed. Pour mixture into an empty Swirl Pint. Place storage lid on pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Remove pint from freezer and remove lid from pint.
Select SOFT SERVE, then ICE CREAM.
When processing is complete, dispense into a chilled bowl or cone and serve immediately.

title: Mint Chocolate Chip Soft Serve
description: Cool mint soft serve with mini chocolate chips. The peppermint extract gives it that iconic green-mint flavor, and the chips add a satisfying crunch to every dispensed swirl.

steps.instruction: In a large bowl, whisk together sugar and pudding mix.
Add milk, heavy cream, peppermint extract, and food coloring. Whisk until combined and sugar is dissolved.
Fold in mini chocolate chips.
Make sure pint base is closed. Pour mixture into an empty Swirl Pint. Place storage lid on pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Remove pint from freezer and remove lid from pint.
Select SOFT SERVE, then ICE CREAM.
When processing is complete, dispense into a chilled bowl or cone and serve immediately.

title: Coffee Soft Serve
description: Smooth espresso-flavored soft serve for coffee lovers. Instant espresso powder gives it a bold coffee kick, perfect dispensed into a cone or alongside a warm brownie.

steps.instruction: In a large bowl, whisk together sugar, pudding mix, and espresso powder.
Add milk, heavy cream, and vanilla. Whisk until fully combined and sugar is dissolved.
Make sure pint base is closed. Pour mixture into an empty Swirl Pint. Place storage lid on pint and freeze for 24 hours.
Remove pint from freezer and remove lid from pint.
Select SOFT SERVE, then ICE CREAM.
When processing is complete, dispense into a chilled bowl or cone and serve immediately.
